items.title: Nonsensical Maven is still a Gradle problem
items.summary: There was a time when I used Maven heavily, but today all the libraries I work on build with Gradle. Even though I'm publishing with Gradle, consumers can use Gradle, Maven, Bazel, jars in libs/ (but please don't), or anything else. That's a huge JVM ecosystem win! In general, I don't have to think about what build system someone is using. I'm not here to d…

items.title: Half Marathon
items.summary: Last Sunday, I participated in the Venloop, a half marathon event in Venlo. I completed the 21KM run in 2h05, a result I am satisfied with as this was my first ever 'official' event since I began running just three months ago. In this post, I'll share my experiences with training, balancing fitness data, and feeling fit.
